viewerMode: Fetched by the userscript and rendered in a sandboxed srcdoc iframe
privacy: Static public documentation only; no MissionChief account data is sent to GitHub
navigationHotfix: Internal fragment links are intercepted and scrolled inside the guide document.
runtimeGuidePatch: Toolkit v4.3.0 upgrades the hosted guide copy in memory with the current Umbrella Containment naming and feature notes before rendering.
